title: atractylodes chinensis f. simplicifolia
intro: Atractylodes chinensis f. simplicifolia, also known as the simplified or single-leaved Chinese atractylodes, is a type of plant that belongs to the family of Compositae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, immunomodulatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, as well as potentially lowering blood sugar levels and cholesterol. Atractylodes chinensis f. simplicifolia is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for internal use, and can also be used topically as a poultice or compress.
